message:
chore: update test vectors and improve mesh node validation

- Regenerate enrollment and simulate request test vectors
- Improve symbol request zone validation in mesh node
- Enhance tailscale tag handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
